objectives.text: Search the chapel settlement. Learn who they are and what they preach.
Break the cult that has taken the chapel.
Ring the basement bell so the Remnant knows the road house is safe enough to enter.
Investigate why the Hallowfen checkpoints stopped answering.

stages.description: A settlement inside an old quarantine chapel on the Hallowfen road has gone quiet. Find out who took it and what they want.
Their own ledger names them the Choir of the Open Wound, a cult no Censure file has ever recorded. It says they kept settlement guards for opening and moved the families before you arrived.
The altar was set for a feeding. End the cell before it raises another saint.
A hidden service cellar runs beneath the split barrel.
The chapel cell is broken. Ring the basement bell so the road office knows the house is safe enough to enter.
The Remnant will hear the basement bell, but Hallowfen's checkpoints still do not answer. Follow the wall road and find who silenced them.
